The '''TIS Zeta 19''' was a light aerospace fighter manufactured by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] for use by the [[Security Police/Legends|Espos]]. Stolen craft were used by criminals in neighboring space.

==Characteristics==
The 15-meter long craft carried one [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], one gunner, two passengers, one day's worth of [[Foodstuff/Legends|consumables]], and 200 kilograms of cargo.

[[File:Tiszeta19.jpg|thumb|left|240px|TIS Zeta 19 interceptors on [[Vaynai/Legends|Vaynai]].]]

Although spaceworthy, the craft was primarily intended for atmospheric combat, and did not have a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]. It could achieve 950 kilometers per hour. Though unshielded, the craft featured two fire-linked laser cannon turrets.

==History==
It was the primary starfighter in the [[Picket Fleet/Legends|CSA Picket Fleet]].

==Appearances==
*[[Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse 3|''Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse'' 3]]
